CREATE TABLE test_datetime (id UInt32, event_time DateTime);
SELECT toHour(event_time) FROM test_datetime WHERE id = 1;
SELECT toHour(event_time) FROM test_datetime WHERE id = 2;
SELECT toHour(event_time) FROM test_datetime WHERE id = 3;
SELECT toHour(event_time) FROM test_datetime WHERE id = 4;
SELECT toHour(event_time) FROM test_datetime WHERE id = 5;
SELECT id, toHour(event_time) as hour_of_event FROM test_datetime WHERE hour_of_event BETWEEN 0 AND 23;

SELECT id, toHour(event_time) AS event_hour FROM test_datetime WHERE event_hour IN (SELECT DISTINCT toHour(event_time) FROM test_datetime WHERE event_time >= toDateTime('2023-04-21 00:00:00') AND event_time < toDateTime('2023-04-21 12:00:00'));
SELECT t1.id, t1.event_time, t2.hour_of_event FROM test_datetime t1 JOIN (SELECT id, toHour(event_time) as hour_of_event FROM test_datetime) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.hour_of_event = 10;
SELECT toHour(toDateTime(CONCAT('2023-04-21 ', hour_string))) FROM (SELECT '15:45:00' AS hour_string) AS time_string;
